positive: A whimsical, stylized celestial landscape featuring a crescent moon intertwined with cosmic dust clouds and a cluster of miniature, glowing constellations. In the foreground, a collection of abstract, stylized planets and rings float in deep space. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, emphasizing strong silhouettes against a gradient midnight blue and rich violet background. Utilize a pop art, linocut, and vaporwave aesthetic, with deep black contrast outlines on luminous, pastel-toned elements. The style must be perfect for screen printing on fabric, resulting in bold shapes and clear separation of color fields. Aspect ratio 1:1.
negative: blur, noisy, watermark, text, logo, signature, realistic photo, gradient shading, complex details, dirty, artifacts, out of frame, messy
